scenario: Consensus blocking finding on a Med-high task — trigger fires; packet built with diff + criteria + findings only.

aggregate.summary: Null pointer dereference when token list is empty.

findings.detail: fetchSegments() dereferences response.data.items[0] without checking that items is non-empty. Empty playlist returns 500.
findings.suggestion: Guard with 'if (!response.data.items?.length) throw new PlaybackError(...)' before access.

consensus.detail: fetchSegments() dereferences response.data.items[0] without checking that items is non-empty. Empty playlist returns 500.
consensus.suggestion: Guard with 'if (!response.data.items?.length) throw new PlaybackError(...)' before access.

isolation_packet.criteria: fetchSegments must throw PlaybackError when segment list is empty. Must not crash on 500. Unit test covers the empty-list case.

reconciled_findings.detail: fetchSegments() dereferences response.data.items[0] without checking that items is non-empty. Empty playlist returns 500.
reconciled_findings.suggestion: Guard with 'if (!response.data.items?.length) throw new PlaybackError(...)' before access.

adjudicator_output.verdict: The guard clause in the diff correctly addresses the finding. The empty-list check precedes the index access and throws a typed error. Finding accepted.
